THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: RESPONDENTS CNC COMPONENTS, INC., AND REDWOOD CITY CABINETS, INC. ARE ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH DECISION AND AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IN ALL RESPECTS, INCLUDING, BUT NOT LIMITED TO, THAT RESPONDENTS SHALL PAY TO PETITIONERS THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, IN THEIR CAPACITIES AS TRUSTEES OF THE CARPENTERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS VACATION-HOLIDAY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, AND NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL, THE SUM OF $118,505.32 IN FRINGE BENEFIT CONTRIBUTIONS AND LIQUIDATED DAMAGES, $2,255.00 IN REASONABLE ATTORNEYS' FEES, AND $725.89 IN COSTS FOR A TOTAL AMOUNT DUE AND OWING OF $121,486.21, AND THAT THE RESPONDENTS SHALL SUBMIT THEIR BOOKS AND RECORDS TO AN AUDIT BY PETITIONERS. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 76263452)

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES IN THEIR CAPACITIES AS TRUSTEES OF THE CARPENTERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS VACATION-HOLIDAY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHER NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT CNC COMPONENTS, INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION REDWOOD CITY CABINETS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $121,486.21 PRINCIPAL, $121,541.79 INTEREST, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $243,073.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar May-15-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ezekiel D. Carder, of Weinberg, Roger & Rosenfeld, Tel. 510.337-1001, for petitioners;
No other appearances.

Ruling: PETITIONERS' THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES IN THEIR CAPACITIES AS TRUSTEES OF THE CARPENTERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR CALIFORNIA, REDWOOD CITY CABINETS, INC., CARPENTERS VACATION-HOLIDAY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, AND NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. Order and judgment signed in open court. Judge Suzanne Bolanos; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302.
